hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path' | { read -r f; if [[ "$f" =~ \.env ]]; then echo '{"continue": false, "stopReason": "BLOCKED: Never edit .env8 directly. Use .env8.sample instead, then manually configure your environment."}'; fi; }
jq -r '.tool_input.file_path' | { read -r f; if [[ "$f" =~ \.(vue|ts|tsx)$ ]] && [[ ! "$f" =~ node_modules ]]; then cd app/vue3 && npm run lint:fix -- "$f" 2>/dev/null || true; fi; }
jq -r '.tool_input.file_path' | { read -r f; if [[ "$f" =~ \.rb$ ]] && [[ ! "$f" =~ ^spec/ ]]; then bundle exec rubocop --autocorrect "$f" 2>/dev/null || true; fi; }
